title: MD
biography: Paul Dudley White was an American cardiologist known as the father of American cardiology. He established cardiology as a medical specialty, co-founded the American Heart Association, and was physician to President Eisenhower.
aiSummary: Paul Dudley White is a cardiology specialist at Massachusetts General Hospital. Based in Boston.
